lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸਰਾਫੁ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਦੇਖੈ ਸੁਆਵਗੀਰ ਸਭਿ ਉਘੜਿ ਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: jaa satigur saraaf nadar kar dekhai suaavageer sabh ugharr aae |
lines.english: When the True Guru, the Tester, observes with His Glance, the selfish ones are all exposed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਜੇਹਾ ਚਿਤਵਹਿ ਨਿਤ ਤੇਹਾ ਪਾਇਨਿ ਓਇ ਤੇਹੋ ਜੇਹੇ ਦਯਿ ਵਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: oe jehaa chitaveh nit tehaa paaein oe teho jehe day vajaae |
lines.english: As one thinks, so does he receive, and so does the Lord make him known.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੁ ਮਨੁ ਇਕੁ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਜਿਤੁ ਲਗੈ ਸੋ ਥਾਇ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eik man ik varatadaa jit lagai so thaae paae |
lines.english: The mortal is of one mind - whatever he dedicates it to, in that he is successful.

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦੁਹੀ ਸਿਰੀ ਖਸਮੁ ਆਪੇ ਵਰਤੈ ਨਿਤ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਦੇਖੈ ਚਲਤ ਸਬਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak duhee siree khasam aape varatai nit kar kar dekhai chalat sabaae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord and Master is pervading at both ends; He continually acts, and beholds His own play. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੋਝੀ ਨਾ ਪਵੈ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੁ ਨ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur sojhee naa pavai ahankaar na vichahu jaae |
lines.english: Without the True Guru, understanding is not obtained, and egotism does not depart from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਈ ਗਲਾ ਕਰੇ ਘਨੇਰੀਆ ਜਿ ਘਰਿ ਵਥੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਸਾਈ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: koee galaa kare ghanereea ji ghar vath hovai saaee khaae |
lines.english: Some talk a lot, but they eat only that which is in their own homes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਹੰਕਾਰੀਆ ਨੋ ਦੁਖ ਭੁਖ ਹੈ ਹਥੁ ਤਡਹਿ ਘਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਮੰਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: ahankaareea no dukh bhukh hai hath taddeh ghar ghar mangaae |
lines.english: Suffering and hunger cling to the egotistical people; they hold out their hands and beg from door to door.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: jis hovai poorab likhiaa tis satigur milai prabh aae |
lines.english: One who has such pre-ordained destiny comes to meet God through the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੁ ਠਗੀ ਗੁਝੀ ਨਾ ਰਹੈ ਮੁਲੰਮਾ ਪਾਜੁ ਲਹਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: koorr tthagee gujhee naa rahai mulamaa paaj leh jaae |
lines.english: Their falsehood and fraud cannot remain concealed; their false appearances fall off in the end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੂ ਧਣੀ ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਵੈ ਚਲਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak ke prabh too dhanee jiau bhaavai tivai chalaae |2|
lines.english: O God, You are the Master of servant Nanak; as it pleases You, You lead him. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਲੋਹਾ ਪਾਰਸਿ ਭੇਟੀਐ ਮਿਲਿ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਸੁਵਰਨੁ ਹੋਇ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jiau lohaa paaras bhetteeai mil sangat suvaran hoe jaae |
lines.english: Just as iron is transmuted into gold by the touch of the Philosopher's Stone, so are people transformed by joining the Sangat, the Holy Congregation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jin har hiradai seviaa tin har aap milaae |
lines.english: One who serves the Lord with all his heart - the Lord Himself unites him with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਕੀ ਸਾਝਿ ਤਿਨ ਸਿਉ ਕਰੀ ਸਭਿ ਅਵਗਣ ਸਬਦਿ ਜਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gun kee saajh tin siau karee sabh avagan sabad jalaae |
lines.english: He enters into a partnership with virtue and merit, and burns off all his demerits with the fire of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਉਗਣ ਵਿਕਣਿ ਪਲਰੀ ਜਿਸੁ ਦੇਹਿ ਸੁ ਸਚੇ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aaugan vikan palaree jis dehi su sache paae |
lines.english: Demerits are purchased cheap, like straw; he alone gathers merit, who is so blessed by the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਗੁਰ ਆਪਣੇ ਜਿਨਿ ਅਉਗਣ ਮੇਟਿ ਗੁਣ ਪਰਗਟੀਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: balihaaree gur aapane jin aaugan mett gun paragatteeae |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to my Guru, who has erased my demerits, and revealed my virtuous merits.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਵਡੇ ਕੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਲਾਏ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: vaddee vaddiaaee vadde kee guramukh aalaae |7|
lines.english: The Gurmukh chants the glorious greatness of the great Lord God. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਮਤ ਸੁਚ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੇ ਹੀ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam ramat such sanjam har naame hee tripataavai |
lines.english: The repetition of the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, is his purity and self-restraint; with the Name of the Lord, He is satisfied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਵਿਚਿ ਵਡੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਜੋ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur vich vaddee vaddiaaee jo anadin har har naam dhiaavai |
lines.english: Great is the greatness within the True Guru, who meditates night and day on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Salok, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ਪੂਜੇ ਗੁਰ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਸੋ ਮਨ ਇਛੇ ਫਲ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jo chit laae pooje gur moorat so man ichhe fal paavai |
lines.english: One who centers his consciousness and worships the Guru, obtains the fruits of his mind's desires.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਤਾਣੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੀਬਾਣੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੋ ਰਖ ਕਰਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: har naam taan har naam deebaan har naamo rakh karaavai |
lines.english: The Lord's Name is His power, and the Lord's Name is His Royal Court; the Lord's Name protects Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਕਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਕੀ ਤਿਸੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਮਾਰ ਦਿਵਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jo nindaa kare satigur poore kee tis karataa maar divaavai |
lines.english: But one who slanders the Perfect True Guru, shall be killed and destroyed by the Creator.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫੇਰਿ ਓਹ ਵੇਲਾ ਓਸੁ ਹਥਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਓਹੁ ਆਪਣਾ ਬੀਜਿਆ ਆਪੇ ਖਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: fer oeh velaa os hath na aavai ohu aapanaa beejiaa aape khaavai |
lines.english: This opportunity shall not come into his hands again; he must eat what he himself has planted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਰਕਿ ਘੋਰਿ ਮੁਹਿ ਕਾਲੈ ਖੜਿਆ ਜਿਉ ਤਸਕਰੁ ਪਾਇ ਗਲਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: narak ghor muhi kaalai kharriaa jiau tasakar paae galaavai |
lines.english: He shall be taken to the most horrible hell, with his face blackened like a thief, and a noose around his neck.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਬਾਤਾ ਆਖਿ ਸੁਣਾਏ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਹਰਿ ਕਰਤੇ ਏਵੈ ਭਾਵੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har baataa aakh sunaae naanak har karate evai bhaavai |1|
lines.english: Nanak speaks and proclaims the Lord's Story; as it pleases the Creator, so does he speak. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸਰਣੀ ਪਵੈ ਤਾ ਉਬਰੈ ਜਾ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: fir satigur kee saranee pavai taa ubarai jaa har har naam dhiaavai |
lines.english: But if he should again take to the Sanctuary of the True Guru, and meditate on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, then he shall be saved.

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਮੰਨੈ ਓਹੁ ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਮੁਠਾ ਬਿਖੁ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: poore gur kaa hukam na manai ohu manamukh agiaan mutthaa bikh maaeaa |
lines.english: One who does not obey the Hukam, the Command of the Perfect Guru - that self-willed manmukh is plundered by his ignorance and poisoned by Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਗਲ ਫਰੋਸੀ ਕਰੇ ਬਹੁਤੇਰੀ ਓਸ ਦਾ ਬੋਲਿਆ ਕਿਸੈ ਨ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: ohu gal farosee kare bahuteree os daa boliaa kisai na bhaaeaa |
lines.english: He babbles on and on, but the words he speaks please no one.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਸੁ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਕੂੜੁ ਕੂੜੋ ਕਰਿ ਬੁਝੈ ਅਣਹੋਦੇ ਝਗੜੇ ਦਯਿ ਓਸ ਦੈ ਗਲਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: os andar koorr koorro kar bujhai anahode jhagarre day os dai gal paaeaa |
lines.english: Within him is falsehood, and he sees everyone else as false; the Lord has tied these useless conflicts around his neck.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਘਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਹੰਢੈ ਜਿਉ ਰੰਨ ਦੋੁਹਾਗਣਿ ਓਸੁ ਨਾਲਿ ਮੁਹੁ ਜੋੜੇ ਓਸੁ ਭੀ ਲਛਣੁ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: ohu ghar ghar handtai jiau ran douhaagan os naal muhu jorre os bhee lachhan laaeaa |
lines.english: He wanders from house to house like an abandoned woman; whoever associates with him is stained by the mark of evil as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਇ ਸੁ ਅਲਿਪਤੋ ਵਰਤੈ ਓਸ ਦਾ ਪਾਸੁ ਛਡਿ ਗੁਰ ਪਾਸਿ ਬਹਿ ਜਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh hoe su alipato varatai os daa paas chhadd gur paas beh jaaeaa |
lines.english: Those who become Gurmukh avoid him; they forsake his company and sit near the Guru.
